  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
  2. AbstractModelMessage

Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.AbstractModelMessage

Packages that use AbstractModelMessage
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi
Provides model-agnostic, intelligent configuration objects for agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
Provides classes related to web grounding and RAG.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.code
Provides specialized message parts for server-side code execution.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.web
Web-centric message extensions and grounding metadata.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider
Provides the core domain model for Anahata's context management system.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool
Provides the core framework for defining, managing, and executing local Java tools.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
Defines the model-agnostic domain model for the tool (function) calling subsystem.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad
Provides the domain model for tools that were requested by the model but could not be found.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java
Provides the concrete domain model for tools implemented as Java methods via reflection.
uno.anahata.asi.anthropic
Provides the provider implementation for Anthropic's Claude API.
uno.anahata.asi.gemini
Provides the provider implementation for Google's Gemini API using the official GenAI Java SDK.
uno.anahata.asi.openai
High-fidelity provider implementation for the OpenAI Responses API (/v1/responses).
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible
Provides a universal, OpenAI-compatible provider implementation for the Anahata ASI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible.adapter
Provides specialized adapters for translating between Anahata's model-agnostic domain objects and OpenAI-compatible wire formats.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.chat
Core chat interface components for the Anahata ASI Swing UI.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message
Contains UI components for rendering different types of messages in the conversation.

    Field
    Description
    private AbstractModelMessage
    Agi.toolPromptMessage
    The model message that initiated the tool calls currently awaiting user approval.

    Field
    Description

    The list of candidate messages currently being generated or waiting for selection.

    The last response received from the model.

    Method
    Description

    Agi.getActiveCandidates()
    Gets an unmodifiable view of the active candidates.

    Agi.getLastResponse()
    Gets the last response received from the AI model.

    Agi.performStreamingTurn(GenerationRequest request)
    Performs an asynchronous streaming generation turn.

    Agi.performSyncTurn(GenerationRequest request)
    Performs a synchronous generation turn.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    Agi.chooseCandidate(@NonNull AbstractModelMessage message)
    Adds a chosen model message to the history, handles tool execution, and continues the conversation if necessary.
    private void
    Agi.setToolPromptMessage(AbstractModelMessage toolPromptMessage)
    Sets the tool prompt message and fires a property change event.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    Agi.handleCandidatesStart(List<? extends AbstractModelMessage> candidates)
    Handles the initial set of candidates received from a stream.
    private boolean
    Agi.handleTurnResult(List<? extends AbstractModelMessage> candidates)
    Handles the final result of a generation turn (sync or stream).
    private void
    Agi.setActiveCandidates(List<AbstractModelMessage> candidates)
    Sets the active candidates and fires a property change event.

    Description
